title: Create: Valhelsia Compatibility
description: Adds recipes to ensure all Valhelsia items can be made using Create's machines.
body:
## Overview
Bridge the gap between Create and Valhelsia content mods. This data pack adds recipes to allow using Create machines to craft Valhelsia blocks that otherwise don't have a Create recipe.

## Recipes added
### Mechanical saw

- All posts (1 log -> 2 posts)
- All stripped posts (1 stripped log -> 2 stripped posts)
- All cut posts (1 post -> 4 cut posts)
- All cut stripped posts (1 stripped post -> 4 cut stripped posts)
- Lapidified jungle planks (1 lapidified jungle log/wood -> 6 lapidified jungle planks)

## Notice
Since this data pack does add to the log and stripped log mechanical saw recipe pools, please ensure that all existing machines in your world have filters on the mechanical saws. Otherwise, you'll get the usual "Create Lottery" for your saw outputs.

## Installation
Save the downloaded data pack .zip file to the `datapacks` folder of your world. If the world is live, use the command `/reload` to load it in. For more details check out the [documentation here](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Data_pack?so=search#Usage).

## Compatibility
Currently tested for 1.20.1 and 1.19.2 only, though very much open to expanding that range wherever Create and Valhelsia can be applied. Feel free to get in touch via the Github [issues page](https://github.com/villainous-j/create-valhelsia-compatibility-datapack/issues) if you have any requests!
